source: OSE CC3 Expanded Equipment, Adventuring Gear only; OSE SRD Adventuring Gear; AV OSE Armor and Weapons List

slot_rules.0: Unencumbering: very small or very light objects.
slot_rules.1: Can generally be carried in one hand.
slot_rules.2: Requires two hands to carry/use or is moderately bulky.
slot_rules.3_plus: Large, heavy, or awkward objects; estimated from likely bulk/weight where exact weights were not provided.

items.name: Backpack
items.description: A leather bag that can be strapped over the shoulders, requiring no hands. Holds up to 400 coins.

items.name: Barrel
items.description: A wooden barrel that holds 40 gallons (320 pints) of liquid.

items.name: Bedroll
items.description: A heavy woollen blanket with a small pillow.

items.name: Bell (miniature)
items.description: A 1-inch brass bell.

items.name: Belt pouch
items.description: A leather pouch that holds up to 100 coins.

items.name: Block and tackle
items.description: Used for hauling or lifting heavy objects. Reduces the effective weight by 75%. Requires 4 times as much rope.

items.name: Box (iron, large)
items.description: A solid iron casket. A large box can hold up to 800 coins.

items.name: Box (iron, small)
items.description: A solid iron casket. A small box can hold up to 250 coins.

items.name: Bucket
items.description: Holds 5 gallons (40 pints).

items.name: Caltrops (20)
items.description: Small metal spikes sufficient to cover a 5-foot by 5-foot area. Creatures moving through the area have a 2-in-6 chance of treading on a spike. Victims suffer a 50% reduction of movement rate for 24 hours, or until they receive magical healing.

items.name: Candles (10)
items.description: Each candle casts dim light in a 5-foot radius and burns for 1 hour.

items.name: Chain (10')
items.description: A 10-foot length of heavy iron chain.

items.name: Chalk (10 sticks)
items.description: Useful for making markings on stone.

items.name: Chest (wooden, large)
items.description: A large wooden chest that can hold up to 1,000 coins.

items.name: Chest (wooden, small)
items.description: A small wooden chest that can hold up to 300 coins.

items.name: Chisel
items.description: Used with a hammer for chipping away stone.

items.name: Cooking pots
items.description: Pots and pans for camp-fire cooking.

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: An iron bar, 2–3 feet long. Used for prying open doors, chest lids, etc.

items.name: Firewood (bundle)
items.description: A bundle of dry wood. Burns for 8 hours.

items.name: Fishing rod and tackle
items.description: A rod, line, hook, and bait box.

items.name: Garlic
items.description: Garlic, commonly used as a protective herb against certain monsters such as vampires.

items.name: Grappling hook
items.description: Made of iron, with 3–4 hooks and a ring to attach a rope.

items.name: Hammer (small)
items.description: Useful for hammering in iron spikes or tapping stonework.

items.name: Holy symbol
items.description: A divine spell caster’s symbol of their deity, often worn as a pendant around the neck.

items.name: Holy symbol (gold)
items.description: A divine spell caster’s symbol of their deity, often worn as a pendant around the neck. The high quality gold grants a +1 bonus to the 2d6 roll for the affected Hit Dice of undead monsters.

items.name: Holy symbol (wooden)
items.description: A divine spell caster’s symbol of their deity, often worn as a pendant around the neck. The low quality incurs a -1 penalty to the 2d6 roll which determines the success of the turning attempt.

items.name: Holy water (vial)
items.description: Water blessed by a holy person and stored in a special vial. Holy water damages undead monsters and loses its power if transferred from its blessed vial.

items.name: Ink (vial)
items.description: A vial of black ink. Coloured ink costs double. Sufficient for about 50 pages of writing.

items.name: Iron spikes (12)
items.description: May be used for wedging doors open or shut, anchoring a rope, and similar purposes.

items.name: Ladder (wooden, 10')
items.description: Simple wooden construction. Very encumbering.

items.name: Lantern
items.description: A shuttered lantern. Burns one oil flask every four hours and casts light in a 30-foot radius.

items.name: Lantern, bullseye
items.description: Casts light in a narrow beam, 60 feet long and 20 feet wide at the end. Can be closed to hide the light. Burns one oil flask every four hours (24 turns).

items.name: Lock
items.description: A basic iron lock with a key.

items.name: Magnifying glass
items.description: Used for studying fine details.

items.name: Manacles
items.description: Iron manacles with a chain. Used for binding hands or feet.

items.name: Marbles (bag of 20)
items.description: A bag of colourful glass beads.

items.name: Mining pick
items.description: For breaking rock.

items.name: Mirror (hand-sized, steel)
items.description: Useful for looking around corners or reflecting a gaze attack.

items.name: Musical instrument (string)
items.description: A stringed instrument, such as a lute or mandolin. The listed price is for an instrument of basic quality. Higher quality instruments can cost up to 10 times as much.

items.name: Musical instrument (wind)
items.description: A wind instrument, such as a flute or pipe. The listed price is for an instrument of basic quality. Higher quality instruments can cost up to 10 times as much.

items.name: Oil (1 flask)
items.description: A flask of oil that fuels a lantern for four hours. If lit, a flask can create a burning 3-foot-diameter pool for 1 turn, dealing 1d8 damage to creatures passing through it.

items.name: Paper/parchment (2 sheets)
items.description: Approximately 1-foot-square sheets.

items.name: Pole (10' long, wooden)
items.description: A 2-inch-thick wooden pole useful for poking and prodding suspicious items in a dungeon.

items.name: Quill
items.description: A large feather sharpened into a writing point.

items.name: Rations, preserved (3)
items.description: Preserved food for long journeys. Lasts 30 days (one week in dank).

items.name: Rations, standard (3)
items.description: Fresh, unpreserved food. Lasts 7 days (one day in dank).

items.name: Rope (50')
items.description: Strong enough to hold the weight of three people and their equipment.

items.name: Sack
items.description: A small sack that can hold up to 6 slots. Requires a free hand to carry when loaded.

items.name: Saw
items.description: A hand saw for cutting wood.

items.name: Scroll case
items.description: An oiled leather tube with a cap. Not completely watertight.

items.name: Sledgehammer
items.description: A big heavy hammer for breaking rock.

items.name: Spade or shovel
items.description: For excavating earth.

items.name: Tent
items.description: Large enough for 2 adult humans.

items.name: Thieves' tools
items.description: A set of lock-picking tools in a small case.

items.name: Tinder box (flint & steel)
items.description: Flint, steel, and tinder contained in a small box. Used to light fires, including torches. Using a tinder box takes one round, with a 2-in-6 chance of success per round.

items.name: Torches (3)
items.description: Three torches. When lit, each casts light in a 30-foot radius and burns for 1 hour.

items.name: Twine (100' ball)
items.description: A wound ball of thin cord or string. Can support up to 300 coins of weight.

items.name: Vial (glass)
items.description: A glass vial that can hold up to half a pint of liquid. Can be bundled up to 5 in one slot.

items.name: Waterskin
items.description: A leather container that holds up to 2 pints, or 1 quart, of liquid.

items.name: Whistle
items.description: Useful for signalling or faking bird calls.

items.name: Wine (2 pints)
items.description: Two pints of wine.

items.name: Wolfsbane (1 bunch)
items.description: A flowering herb that can be used to repel lycanthropes. The creature must be hit with the herb in melee combat.

items.name: Padded
items.description: AC 11.

items.name: Furs
items.description: AC 12.

items.name: Leather
items.description: AC 12.

items.name: Studded leather
items.description: AC 13.

items.name: Lorica Hamata
items.description: AC 14. This armor set is rarely sold. It marks the wearer as a soldier in the Archontean legions. Most citizens do not look kindly on those who falsely claim to be legionnaires.

items.name: Chainmail
items.description: AC 14.

items.name: Lorica Segmentata
items.description: AC 15. This armor set is rarely sold. It marks the wearer as a soldier in the Archontean legions. Most citizens do not look kindly on those who falsely claim to be legionnaires.

items.name: Archontean Lamellar
items.description: AC 16.

items.name: Shield
items.description: AC +1 bonus. A shield can absorb damage from a single successful attack, but then is rendered useless.

items.name: Helmet
items.description: AC N/A. A helmet can absorb damage from a single successful critical hit, but then is rendered useless. It also imposes a -1 penalty to Surprise.

items.name: Battle axe
items.description: Traits: Deadly, Melee, Shield Grappler, Two-handed.

items.name: Blackjack
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Knock-out, Melee, Stealth.

items.name: Blowgun
items.description: Traits: Missile 10/20/30, Poison.

items.name: Bolas
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Entangle, Missile 20/40/60.

items.name: Club
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Knock-out, Melee.

items.name: Crossbow
items.description: Traits: Deadly, Missile 80/160/240, Slow, Two-handed.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: Traits: Light, Melee, Missile 10/20/30, Quick draw.

items.name: Flail
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Deadly, Melee, Shield Grappler, Two-handed.

items.name: Garotte
items.description: Traits: Melee, Stealth, Strangle, Two-handed.

items.name: Hand axe
items.description: Traits: Light, Melee, Missile 10/20/30, Shield Grappler.

items.name: Holy water vial
items.description: Traits: Missile 10/30/50, Splash.

items.name: Javelin
items.description: Traits: Missile 30/60/90.

items.name: Lance
items.description: Traits: Charge, Melee, Specialized.

items.name: Long bow
items.description: Traits: Deadly, Missile 70/140/210, Specialized, Two-handed.

items.name: Mace
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Knock-out, Melee.

items.name: Net
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Entangle, Missile 10/20/30.

items.name: Oil flask, burning
items.description: Traits: Missile 10/30/50, Splash.

items.name: Polearm
items.description: Traits: Brace, Deadly, Melee, Specialized, Two-handed.

items.name: Short bow
items.description: Traits: Missile 50/100/150, Two-handed.

items.name: Short sword
items.description: Traits: Light, Melee, Quick draw.

items.name: Sling
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Missile 40/80/160.

items.name: Spear
items.description: Traits: Brace, Melee, Missile 20/40/60.

items.name: Staff
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Melee, Two-handed.

items.name: Sword
items.description: Traits: Melee, Quick draw, Versatile.

items.name: Torch
items.description: Traits: Melee. Cost: 1 gp for 6.

items.name: Two-handed sword
items.description: Traits: Brutal, Deadly, Melee, Slow, Two-handed.

items.name: War hammer
items.description: Traits: Blunt, Crushing, Melee.

items.name: Whip
items.description: Traits: Entangle, Melee.
